videoSnippet.title: The Challenger Becometh the Master | Andy Woodward vs Marc'Andria Maurizzi | Tata Steel 2026
videoSnippet.description:
Download Lotus Chess Here! https://onelink.to/lotus-agadmator

Search all my videos easy https://agadmator-library.github.io/

Woodward, Andy (2608) - Maurizzi, MarcAndria (2611)
Tata Steel Chess 2026 (Chess.com) [11] 2026.01.30
E06 Catalan, closed, 5.Nf3

1.d4 Nf6 2.c4 e6 3.g3 d5 4.Bg2 Be7 5.Nf3 Ne4 6.O-O f5 7.b3 Nc6 8.Ba3 Bf6 9.e3 h5 10.Nfd2 h4 11.Nxe4 dxe4 12.Nc3 hxg3 13.fxg3 Nxd4 14.Nxe4 fxe4 15.Qg4 Kf7 16.exd4 Qxd4+ 17.Kh1 e5 18.Qe2 Be6 19.Bxe4 Rxh2+ 20.Kxh2 Rh8+ 21.Kg2 Bh3+ 22.Kf3
